Stephan Fabel

![][image1]

Nvidia:  
Stephan Fabel is a Principal Product Strategist at NVIDIA, bringing over a decade of experience in Silicon Valley and has been working in the in the tech industry for over 30 years. With a background in computer engineering and robotics, he has been at the forefront of innovation in AI infrastructure and GPU cloud computing. Originally from Germany, Stephan moved to the United States in 2007 and has since become a driving force in product development at the world's leading technology companies. His expertise spans across various domains, including artificial intelligence, open source, and cloud computing.

ThisWay Global:  
Stephan Fabel is the Chief Executive Officer of ThisWay Global, a Google-accelerated, VC-backed leader in AI-powered high-performance cloud computing. With more than 30 years in the technology industry and a distinguished background in computer engineering, robotics, and cloud AI infrastructure, Stephan brings significant executive experience to driving product strategy, organizational growth, and large-scale digital transformation for global enterprises. Before joining ThisWay Global, Stephan held senior leadership roles at NVIDIA and other leading Silicon Valley technology companies, where he led cross-functional teams at the forefront of artificial intelligence, open-source cloud computing, and enterprise platform development. Originally from Germany, Stephan's career has spanned both Europe and the United States since 1998, integrating deep technical expertise with a passion for driving innovation. Outside of work, Stephan is professional dad of four who enjoys exploring California with his wife and four children, where he balances his executive responsibilities with a commitment to volunteering and philanthropy, bringing curiosity and dedication to both family life and community impact.
